stamp.title: Switzerland 1854 5r Brown Helvetia Seated (Imperf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia (Strubel) issue, 5r brown, imperforate with silk thread. Used with circular cancel. Margin on all four sides, appears close at top right.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1854 15r Rose Helvetia Seated (Imperf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia (Strubel) issue, 15r rose/pale red-brown, imperforate with silk thread. Heavy circular cancel obscures part of the design.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 2r Gray Helvetia Seated (Perf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia perforated issue, 2r gray. Part of a circular cancel visible on the left side.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 3r Black Helvetia Seated (Perf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia perforated issue, 3r black. Circular cancel at top left.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 3r Black Helvetia Seated (Perf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia perforated issue, 3r black. Cancelled with a large circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 40r Green Helvetia Seated (Perf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia perforated issue, 40r green. Used with a circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 1fr Gold Helvetia Seated (Perf)
stamp.summary: Sitting Helvetia perforated issue, 1fr gold/bronze. Used with circular cancel.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1881 2c Brown Helvetia Seated
stamp.summary: Helvetia Seated (numeral in corners) issue, 2c brown. Used.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1882-1907 25c Green Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: Standing Helvetia issue, 25c green. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1882-1907 30c Blue Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: Standing Helvetia issue, 30c blue. Part of a lot with stock number 33. Used.

stamp.summary: Standing Helvetia issue, 30c blue. Second of three examples on the sheet. Used.
